The family Asteraceae is further divided into several subfamilies, including the subfamily Asteroideae, which Sieberia viridis is a part of. The genus Sieberia is a relatively small group of flowering plants, with Sieberia viridis being one of the species within it. The classification of Sieberia viridis is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf shape and flower structure. By classifying Sieberia viridis within the family Asteraceae, botanists can better understand its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same family.
